reason: Verify migration follows conventions: sequential ID, nullable column, Mapped[] syntax
Verify favicon fetch errors are handled gracefully without crashing feed refresh
Backend quality: async patterns, no bare except, specific exception types
Verify nullable icon_url handled with optional chaining, not assertions
Verify icon rendering follows component patterns: named exports, cn() for classes
Verify icon_url flows correctly: DB → schema → API response → frontend type → component
Check implementation against PRD requirements and acceptance criteria
